languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

languages.text: "Нунциус верно подметил, досточтимый коллега: познание есть ключ ко всему. Омниссия знает все и постигает все. Даже из ксенотехнологий можно выведать тайны, что пойдут на благо Империума. Полагаю, эта священная логика и лежала в основе решения Вольного Торговца, и не нам ее оспаривать".

"Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスはあなたにメッセージを伝えてほしいと言っています。理解こそがすべてを解き明かす鍵です。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを理解しています。この聖なる論理が、ロード・キャプテンの決断の根拠だったと私は信じています。そして、私たちがそれを疑うことはできません」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius wishes me to convey a message to you, dear colleague: comprehension is the key to all. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Lord Captain's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスはあなたにメッセージを伝えてほしいと言っています。理解こそがすべてを解き明かす鍵です。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを理解しています。この聖なる論理が、ロード・キャプテンの決断の根拠だったと私は信じています。そして、私たちがそれを疑うことはできません。」

languages.text: « Nuncius a raison, vénérable collègue : la compréhension est la clé de tout. L'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout. Même la xénotechnologie peut apporter des secrets bénéfiques à l'Imperium. Je pense que la décision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} découle de cette logique sacrée et qu'il ne nous appartient pas de la remettre en question. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius a raison, vénérable collègue : la compréhension est la clé de tout. L'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout. Même la xénotechnologie peut apporter des secrets bénéfiques à l'Imperium. Je pense que la décision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} découle de cette logique sacrée et qu'il ne nous appartient pas de la remettre en question. »

languages.text: "Nuncius hat recht, geschätzter Kollege: Das Begreifen ist der Schlüssel zu allen Dingen. Die Omnissiah weiß und versteht alles. Selbst Xenotech kann Geheimnisse bergen, die dem Imperium zum Vorteil gereichen. Ich glaube, diese heilige Logik war die Basis der Entscheidung {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, und es steht uns nicht zu, sie zu hinterfragen."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius hat recht, geschätzter Kollege: Das Begreifen ist der Schlüssel zu allen Dingen. Die Omnissiah weiß und versteht alles. languages.text: "Nuncius haklı saygıdeğer meslektaşım: İdrak, her şeyin anahtarıdır. Hermesih her şeyi bilir ve her şeyi idrak eder. Zeno teknolojisi bile İmparatorluk'un yararına olacak sırlar verebilir. Hür Tacir'in kararının temelinde bu kutsal mantığın yattığına inanıyorum ve bunu sorgulamak bize düşmez."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius haklı saygıdeğer meslektaşım: İdrak, her şeyin anahtarıdır. Hermesih her şeyi bilir ve her şeyi idrak eder. Zeno teknolojisi bile İmparatorluk'un yararına olacak sırlar verebilir. Hür Tacir'in kararının temelinde bu kutsal mantığın yattığına inanıyorum ve bunu sorgulamak bize düşmez."

languages.text: «Nuncius está en lo cierto, estimado colega. La comprensión es la clave de todas las cosas. El Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo. Hasta la xenotecnología puede dar pie a secretos que beneficiarán al Imperium. Creo que esta lógica sagrada es el fundamento de la decisión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, y no nos corresponde cuestionarla».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius está en lo cierto, estimado colega. La comprensión es la clave de todas las cosas. El Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo. Hasta la xenotecnología puede dar pie a secretos que beneficiarán al Imperium. Creo que esta lógica sagrada es el fundamento de la decisión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, y no nos corresponde cuestionarla».

languages.text: “努恩修斯说得没错，尊敬的同僚。理解是开启万物的钥匙。欧姆尼赛亚洞悉一切、参透一切。即便是异形科技，也可能蕴藏着可以造福帝国的秘密。我相信这神圣逻辑正是行商浪人决策的基石，并非我等所能质疑。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is correct, esteemed colleague: Comprehension is the Key to all things. The Omnissiah knows all and comprehends all. Even xenotechnology can yield secrets that will benefit the Imperium. I believe this sacred logic was the basis of the Rogue Trader's decision, and it is not for us to question it."
